title: If a function has internal linkage then all re-declarations shall include the static storage class specifer
description: If a function has internal linkage then all re-declarations shall include the static storage class speciferAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellmisra-c++2008misra-c2004pitfallWhy is this an issue?More InfoThis rule is a strict implementation of a MISRA (Motor Industry Software Reliability Association) rule. MISRA defines best practices for developing safety-critical software. You can learn more about this rule in the MISRA documents referenced below.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Function with internal linkage (static) redeclared without static keyword. All redeclarations must include static.
Function definition missing static keyword after static declaration. Ensure all redeclarations include static.
Inconsistent static storage class specifier. Function with internal linkage must have static in all declarations.
